_comment: Stub LLM response fixture — simulates a low-confidence decision from 04_decide.rl.
_usage: Used by test_full_pipeline_defer_decision to assert that the pipeline defers when confidence is low.

attributes.reasoning_summary: Confidence below threshold — defaulting to defer for safety

goals_resolved: determine final Decision as one of: proceed, defer, escalate, skip
assign confidence_score to Decision between 0.0 and 1.0
assign reasoning_summary to Decision in plain text
annotate Decision with dry_run_active from BotState configuration
goals_deferred: evaluate PrimaryAction for Decision with confidence threshold 0.65

raw_llm_text:
After reviewing the available evidence, I cannot reach sufficient confidence to recommend a primary action. The subject data is ambiguous and the analysis signals are inconsistent. I am deferring this subject to the next review cycle.

Decision has action of "defer".
Decision has confidence_score of 0.32.
Decision has reasoning_summary of "Confidence below threshold — defaulting to defer for safety".
Decision has dry_run_active of "true".
